title: Raccoon Removal in Cedarhurst, NY | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Cedarhurst, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Cedarhurst homes. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Cedarhurst, where they're attracted to the area's mature trees, accessible garbage, and spacious attics in the community's beautiful residential homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Cedarhurst and surrounding Long Island communities, using humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of wildlife control in this established Nassau County neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Cedarhurst homeowners for years with fast, effective raccoon removal that prioritizes both safety and humane treatment. Our licensed wildlife specialists provide complete services from initial inspection to exclusion work and attic restoration, ensuring raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Cedarhurst's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Cedarhurst Park create ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. The area's mix of Tudor and Colonial-style homes with mature landscaping provides numerous entry points that our team expertly secures against future wildlife intrusions.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Cedarhurst typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring repair, and any attic damage or contamination cleanup needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Cedarhurst home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Cedarhurst residents in most cases. Initial trapping can take 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons, and complete exclusion work is typically finished within 1-2 weeks to ensure your home is fully protected against re-entry.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to my family and pets in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose health risks as they may carry rabies, roundworm, and other diseases. They can also become aggressive when cornered or protecting their young. Additionally, raccoons cause property damage by tearing insulation, damaging roofing, and contaminating attics with droppings. Professional removal is always recommended.

faqs.question: What does your raccoon removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough property inspection, humane live trapping and removal of all raccoons, identification and sealing of all entry points, attic cleanup and sanitization if needed, damage repair, and a warranty against re-entry. We handle every aspect of raccoon control to give you lasting peace of mind.
